mappings.control_id: Embedding store service account with cross-tenant read access
mappings.notes: Per-tenant credentials or row-level security with minimum scope
Require authentication for all vector database connections

mappings.control_id: Same embedding store credential used for multiple tenants
mappings.notes: Separate credentials per tenant or use row-level security

mappings.control_name: Protect all code from unauthorised access — data exfiltration prevention
mappings.notes: Implement controls preventing sensitive data exfiltration through model interfaces, API endpoints, and pipeline outputs; enforce data classification boundaries

mappings.control_name: Secure coding — data handling in AI pipelines
mappings.notes: Enforce secure coding practices for all data handling in AI pipelines; implement output filtering, PII detection, and data masking before model responses reach consumers

mappings.control_name: Review for security vulnerabilities — data leakage review
mappings.notes: Include data leakage and memorisation scenarios in pre-release security reviews; verify that outputs cannot reveal training data or sensitive context

mappings.control_name: Protection of Information at Rest — AI data encryption
mappings.notes: Encrypt all AI data at rest — training data, model weights, inference logs, embedding stores — using FIPS 140-validated modules
Enforce role-based access control on all AI data stores; restrict access based on clearance, need-to-know, and data sensitivity
Log AI data access and model outputs with sufficient detail to detect data leakage; include output content metadata
Monitor model outputs and data access patterns for leakage indicators — PII, credentials, classification markings in outputs; alert on detection

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — data leakage controls
mappings.notes: Implement security controls preventing AI data leakage — output monitoring, DLP, access controls, and encryption for all financial AI data

mappings.control_name: ICT Incident Management — data breach reporting
mappings.notes: Classify AI data leakage events as ICT-related incidents; report to competent authorities per DORA incident classification criteria
Deploy detection for data leakage indicators in model outputs — PII, financial data, credentials; alert and block on detection
Conduct post-incident analysis for data leakage events; identify root cause and update controls
